message:
Merge PR #2740: feat: repo-sourced rig settings + polecat test awareness

Projects can commit .gastown/settings.json with rig settings (test_command,
build_command, etc.) that survive re-scaffolding. Resolution order: repo
defaults (git) -> rig-local overrides (operator) -> --var flags (one-shot).

Also fixes polecats silently skipping quality gates when commands are
unconfigured - now directs them to check CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2740
Author: jcii

files.patch:
@@ -347,7 +347,9 @@ If typecheck_command is set:
 {{typecheck_command}}
 ```
 
-Empty commands mean "not configured" — skip silently.
+If any command is empty (not configured), check CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md in the
+repo root for project-specific build/test/lint instructions. **Do NOT silently
+skip** — the project may have critical quality gates documented there.
 
 **2. If build fails:**
 - Fix it. Return to implement step if needed.
@@ -359,13 +361,14 @@ If you modified or added test files, run those specific tests to catch
 obvious regressions. Do NOT run the full test suite — that's the
 Refinery's job.
 
+If test_command is set:
 ```bash
-# Example: run only tests in packages you changed
-go test ./internal/pkg/you/changed/...
-# Or for JS: npx jest --testPathPattern="changed-file"
+{{test_command}} --filter "RelevantTests"
 ```
 
-If you're unsure which tests are relevant, skip this — the MQ will catch it.
+If test_command is NOT set, check CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md for the project's
+test command. Many projects have a "Definition of Done" section with the
+exact command to run.
 
 **4. Lint (OPTIONAL — run if configured and fast):**
 
@@ -471,7 +474,9 @@ If test_command is set:
 {{test_command}}
 ```
 
-Empty commands mean "not configured" — skip silently.
+If any command is empty (not configured), check CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md in the
+repo root for project-specific instructions. **Do NOT silently skip gates** —
+the project's definition of done may require specific commands.
 
 **3. If any gate fails after rebase:**
 - Fix the issue, commit, and re-run from step 1

@@ -196,6 +196,11 @@ When your work is done, follow this checklist — **step 4 is REQUIRED**:
 **Quality gates are not optional.** Worktrees may not trigger pre-commit hooks,
 so you MUST run lint/format/tests manually before every commit.
 
+**Project-specific gates:** Read CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md in the repo root for
+the project's definition of done. Many projects require a specific test harness
+(not just `go test` or `dotnet test`). If AGENTS.md exists, its "Core rule"
+section defines what "done" means for this project.
+
 The `gt done` command pushes your branch, creates an MR bead in the MQ, nukes
 your sandbox, and exits your session. **You are gone after `gt done`.**
